name: Reuben Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: :20
Combine all meat mixture ingredients in a medium bowl. Press half of the mixture into the bottom of a loaf pan. Make a slight indentation, lengthwise down the center of the meatloaf. Combine all filling mixture and place it in the indentation. Top with remaining meat mixture, pressing to enclose the filling and sealing edges. Cook at HIGH (100%) for 13-18 minutes or until firm and the internal temperature reaches 145°F. Let stand covered for 5 minutes.
